full_text:
Humu Biao 胡母彪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Humu Biao (胡母彪)was born in Taishan commandery, probably in Fenggao county. Persuaded fellow-country man and possible in-law Wang Kuang to release an uncle of Chang Lin. Humu Biao was affiliated with Wang Kuang.
